name: Hosting Referral Contractor Redirect
description: A client asks the developer to register a domain or buy hosting through a specific referral link to 'verify suitability' before work starts, harvesting affiliate fees and credentials.

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Hello, I am looking to hire a full-stack developer to manage and host our company site. We pay $60/hr.

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: Hi, I have extensive experience in full-stack web development. I can definitely help with that. Where is the site currently hosted?

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: We are migrating everything. Before I can award you the contract, you must sign up for a testing server at securehost-registration-portal.xyz/ref=28192 and buy the $15 developer hosting plan. This is to prove you can access and configure their environment. Send me the registration confirmation screenshot and I will hire you immediately and refund the $15.

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: Can't we use a free trial account, or can you create a sub-account for me to use instead?

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: No, our security policy requires each contractor to purchase their own testing package through that specific partner link. If you can't pay the $15, you are not serious about this job. Let me know if you do it or I move to the next candidate.

red_flags: Hosting or domain referral link redirection
Coercive warning threat of moving to other candidates
Promising immediate reimbursement for off-platform expense
